Even if Li2CuH6 turns out dynamically stable, this strongly suggests Tc << 86 K literature prediction. d6 honesty: number TBD post-harvest, NO forcing.

partial_q_verdict_protocol_d17: 🔴 CLOSED_NEGATIVE — lock at first q with min_freq < -50 cm^-1 (Mg2IrH6 pattern; ~5 q sufficient for falsification)
🟢 candidate — all q real OR mild Γ-soft only → wait full grid, then σ-plateau + Allen-Dynes Tc
⚪ anharmonic 보류 — mild Γ-soft only (labeh8/ysbh6 pattern) → SSCHA follow-up required
winner candidate threshold — Tc > 56 K (h3as N5 winner); below = honest data point on N6 funnel
